description: Clean the oral history interview data for archival readiness. The final spreadsheet must feature standardized dates, calculated interviewee ages, and an archive readiness validation formula. Apply conditional formatting to identify errors and sort the records to prioritize incomplete entries. Save the result to /home/ga/Documents/cleaned_oral_history.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You are helping a local historical society prepare oral history interviews for archival submission. The spreadsheet has inconsistent date formats, missing age calculations, and no clear indication of which interviews are ready for submission. Standardize the dates, calculate interviewee ages at time of interview, create a validation formula to check if all archive requirements are met (complete transcription, signed release form, topic tags present), apply conditional formatting to visually distinguish complete from incomplete records, and sort the data to show the oldest incomplete interviews first.
